nodes.name: William Swainson

nodes.name: 棕翅蟻鵙

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-winged antshrike (Thamnophilus torquatus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Paraguay.Remsen, J

links.evidence: The rufous-winged antshrike is found in Brazil from southern Pará east to Pernambuco and south to Rio de Janeiro state in the east
